description: Public Tier-1 contract and example library for moods, regions, personas, policies, and BCI-safe tilesets. Schema authority and safe example host for T1-core object kinds.

POL002_NoRawNarrativeInTier.description: Contracts and schemas must not embed explicit narrative content; use references to vault content instead.

POL003_RequireSchemaRef.description: All JSON artifacts in this repo must include a schemaRef pointing to an approved schema in this repo or HorrorPlace-Constellation-Contracts.

POL004_RequireTargetMetadata.description: AI-authored artifacts must declare objectKind, tier, targetRepo, targetPath, and schemaRef for deterministic routing and registry binding.

POL006_RequireRoutingSpineRef.description: Authoring tools must consult routingSpineRef for route resolution before writing any artifact into this repo.

authoringHints.summary: Use this repo for public Tier-1 contracts and safe examples: moods, regions, personas, policies, and BCI tilesets. Schemas and example instances live here; high-intensity content lives in vault repos.
aiBehavior: Only generate artifacts for moodContract, regionContractCard, eventContract, personaContractCard, policyContractCard, or bci-geometry-tileset in this repo.
Always resolve objectKind and tier through the routing spine before choosing Horror.Place as the targetRepo.
Do not generate raw narrative or deep-history region cards; reference vault IDs and invariant bands instead.
Ensure every artifact includes schemaRef, targetRepo, targetPath, tier, and objectKind before proposing a filename.
Respect implicitDeny=true: do not introduce new objectKinds without explicit changes to allowedObjectKinds.
